observed.claim: The subject stands with the left hand touching the doorway.

subjects.head_expression_gaze: preserve the exact source head direction, restrained expression, and gaze target
subjects.wardrobe: preserve the source wardrobe and asymmetry
contacts: right hand remains in coat pocket

scene_topology: room and visible furniture retain their source-relative positions
lighting: all visible light sources remain fixed in world space
look: preserve source palette, contrast, texture, and grain

prompt_context.task_definition: Recreate the same frozen instant while moving only the camera.
prompt_context.identity_pose_contact_lock: Keep identity, age, body, pose, balance, head, expression, gaze, wardrobe, asymmetry, hands, props, and contacts unchanged.
prompt_context.scene_time_light_lock: Keep scene topology, object positions, temporal state, and all light sources fixed in world space.
prompt_context.look_contract: Match the source camera character, depth, palette, texture, and grain without cosmetic retouching.
prompt_context.negative_contract: No mirroring, subject rotation, new action, new gaze, crop or zoom substitute, scene relayout, camera-following beauty light, added person, text, logo, or unsupported salient detail.
